--- filter.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
FILTER a > 1
RETURN a

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLFilter{
            Filter: 15,
            Expr:   &ast.BinaryExpr{
              Op:   ">",
              Left: &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 22,
                NameEnd: 23,
                Name:    "a",
              },
              Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 26,
                ValueEnd: 27,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "1",
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 28,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 35,
                  NameEnd: 36,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph FILTER WHERE a > 1 RETURN a
